strategy.name: Michaël van de Poppe — Golden Pocket + Market Structure
strategy.source: Michaël van de Poppe (@CryptoMichNL) — MN Trading Academy, Medium, YouTube
strategy.description: Top-down multi-timeframe strategy. Set bias on Daily/4H using EMA 21/50/200 and market structure (HH/HL vs LH/LL). Enter at Fibonacci Golden Pocket (0.618–0.65) confluence with EMA. RSI confirms momentum.

indicators.ema_21: Short-term dynamic support/resistance. Price bouncing off EMA 21 in uptrend = continuation.
indicators.ema_50: Medium-term trend filter. Close above = bullish. Close below = bearish.
indicators.ema_200: Macro trend filter. Only take longs above EMA 200. Only take shorts below EMA 200.
indicators.rsi_14: Momentum filter. Long entries: RSI between 40–65. Short entries: RSI between 35–60. Avoid extremes.
indicators.fibonacci: Golden Pocket zone = 0.618 to 0.65 retracement of last swing. Primary entry zone.

bullish: Price is above EMA 21 AND EMA 50
Market structure shows Higher Highs and Higher Lows on the setup timeframe
bearish: Price is below EMA 21 AND EMA 50
Market structure shows Lower Highs and Lower Lows
neutral: Price is between EMA 21 and EMA 50 — no trade

long: Daily bias is bullish: price above EMA 21 and EMA 50, RSI > 50
Price is above EMA 200 (macro bull market confirmed)
Price has pulled back toward EMA 21 or EMA 50 (within 0.6% of either)
RSI is between 40 and 65 — not overbought at entry
short: Daily bias is bearish: price below EMA 21 and EMA 50, RSI < 50
Price is below EMA 200 (macro bear market confirmed)
Price has rallied back toward EMA 21 or EMA 50 (within 0.6% of either)
RSI is between 35 and 60 — not oversold at entry

exit_rules.stop_loss: 1.5% below entry for longs / 1.5% above entry for shorts
exit_rules.take_profit_1: Previous swing high (long) or swing low (short) — close 50% of position
exit_rules.take_profit_2: Fibonacci extension 1.272 from entry — close 30% of position
exit_rules.invalidation: If price closes back below EMA 21 and EMA 50 within 2 candles after entry — exit immediately

risk_rules: Risk maximum 2% of portfolio per trade ($20 on a $1,000 portfolio)
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Do not trade if price is more than 3% away from the nearest EMA — overextended
Do not trade on weekends — reduce position size on Saturdays/Sundays
Never trade against the higher timeframe bias
Confluence required: at least EMA touch + RSI in range must both be true
strategy.safety_check_summary: The bot will only trade when ALL of the following are true: (1) Price is above/below both EMA 21 and EMA 50 matching the direction, (2) Price is above/below EMA 200 matching the direction, (3) Price is within 0.6% of EMA 21 or EMA 50 — the entry confluence zone, (4) RSI 14 is between 40–65 for longs or 35–60 for shorts. If any single condition fails, no trade fires.

short: Price rallies to VWAP from below but fails to close above

long: Price makes lower low, RSI makes higher low (bullish divergence)
short: Price makes higher high, RSI makes lower high (bearish divergence)

timeframes.session: First 30 minutes of UTC 00:00 or 08:00 opens

long: Price closes above OR High on 15m

global_risk_rules: Risk no more than 2% of capital per trade
Best entries occur when 2+ conditions align simultaneously
BTC trades 24/7 — reduce size on weekends
Extreme funding rates above 0.1% on perpetuals — avoid entering in that direction
